texto: If you're going to give up so quickly, I don't think you'll last long but you should try telling yourself you won't ever give up. Nobody can say how this will turn out but you should try the hardest you've ever tried in your life so you'll have no regrets
explicacao: Orientação direta de Hitori Nakano sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “If you're going to give up so quickly, I don't think you'll last long but you should try telling …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, japanese-literature, young-adult, útil em momentos de young-adult.
